title: Biomethane potential is clear, policy gaps persist [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Europe has the resources to scale biomethane and reduce energy dependence, but policy gaps are slowing progress. Without stronger regulatory support and investment certainty, the EU risks missing a strategic opportunity to strengthen energy security and accelerate decarbonisation.
summary_public: Europe has the resources to scale biomethane and reduce energy dependence, but policy gaps are slowing progress. Without stronger regulatory support and investment certainty, the EU risks missing a strategic opportunity…
